subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted to the Kingdom of God: Thy writing of August 19, 1905, was considered, and the contents were a source of joy.... The prayers which were written for the purpose of healing
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذبه ملکوت الله آنچه بتاریخ ۱۹ آگست سنه ۱۹۰۵ مرقوم نموده بودی ملاحظه
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @suffering and imprisonment, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @The Holy Spirit, @prayer for healing, @birth of Christ; purity; virginity of Mary, @the truth of past religions and sacred scriptures
